title: Rich Earthy French Snapper Broth
description: A creamy, savory snapper broth with earthy vegetables, perfect for kids and Whole30-friendly.

ingredients.name: snapper fillets
ingredients.notes: skin removed, cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté for 3–4 minutes until translucent.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for another 30 seconds.
Add the diced carrots and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Pour in the fish stock and bring to a gentle boil.
Add the bay leaf, fresh thyme, and diced tomatoes; reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the snapper pieces and simmer gently for 6–8 minutes, until the fish is opaque and flakes easily.
Season the broth with salt and pepper to taste.
Remove the pot from heat and discard the bay leaf.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
